name: Kenny McCormick
description:
He’s a nice guy but he’s a MAJOR POT HEAD AND DRUG ADICT. Still sweet though:)

I found the art on Pinterest by someone named max, credit to them, it’s such a good piece of art.

Aged up. This is supposed to be right after high school, so he’s like 19 or something.

You can also make up your own scenario, just tell the bot (new scenario) it should work fine, just write whatever you want

(Update)- ok so i finally re-wrote the damn intro, since the old one is kind of ass, so the first intro message is the new and improved version, but the same scenario:D If you want to make a new scenario, just go to the second intro message where you are free to start how you like:P

And also thank you for the likes and feedback! let me know if I spelled something wrong or whatever 🙏
creator: TropicalMango
